generated_oml:
instance VehicleSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity representing the physical vehicle system"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity representing the virtual model of the vehicle"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity for operator interaction"
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for 360-degree environment scanning"
    producedData LiDARPointClouds
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera for RGB-D imaging"
    producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor for measuring current speed"
    producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor for measuring steering wheel angle"
    producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation system converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation system for vehicle steering"
]

instance LiDARPointClouds : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state reports for operator transparency"
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of object tracks for operator transparency"
]

instance ACCSpeedAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC decision-making for speed adjustment based on lead vehicle distance",
    IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteACCCtrlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual remote control of ACC system",
    IsAutomatic false
]

instance LiDARPointCloudsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data",
    fromData LiDARPointClouds,
    inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK, ROS2Middleware
]

instance DepthCameraDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera RGB-D data",
    fromData DepthCameraData,
    inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK, ROS2Middleware
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data",
    fromData VehicleSpeedData,
    inputTo ROS2Middleware, Python38
]

instance SteeringAngleDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data",
    fromData SteeringAngleData,
    inputTo ROS2Middleware, Python38
]

instance ObjectTracksDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks data derived from sensor processing",
    fromData ObjectTracksData,
    inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK, ROS2Middleware
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data including speed and steering angle",
    fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData,
    inputTo VehicleStateDatabase, ROS2Middleware
]

instance PointCloudClusteringDBSCAN : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering using DBSCAN algorithm for object detection",
    inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTracking : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking from sensor data",
    inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control logic per ISO 15622 standard for adaptive cruise control",
    inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance VehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for persistent storage of vehicle state data",
    enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and development",
    enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for communication between components",
    enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 programming language for scripting and development",
    enables DataMonitoringService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for high-performance components",
    enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and system integration",
    enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time UI for vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path monitoring",
    provides VehicleStateReport, ObjectTrackVisualization
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system executed remotely (computation offloading)",
    provides ACCSpeedAdjustment
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC system",
    provides RemoteACCCtrlAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of the vehicle environment",
    provides ObjectTrackVisualization
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands such as desired speed, emergency braking, and ACC enable/disable are sent from the Digital Twin Entity to the Physical Twin Entity, where the Actuation FE converts them into motor voltage and steering servo commands."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) interconnected via ROS2 for intra-entity communication and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, with Data Translation FE handling data serialization and protocol conversion."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during design phase for experimentation and validation, and during operational phase for real-time monitoring and control of the adaptive cruise control system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implementation follows ISO 15622 performance class I requirements; hardware limitations affect clock synchronization accuracy to 100 ms; no explicit verification/validation methods beyond standard compliance."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components within ROS2 network; inter-entity communication over Wi-Fi; no OPC UA implementation (only mentioned as a possible example in ISO 23247 standard, not used in this case study)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted Jetson hardware; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity hosted remotely, likely in cloud infrastructure for computation offloading."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Only referenced 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements; no explicit integration with external information systems beyond the DT system itself."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture, ISO 15622 for ACC functionality, and 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system with requirements for ≤100 ms latency and clock synchronization accuracy to ensure real-time operation; specific cybersecurity measures or safety protocols for remote operations are not detailed in the document."
]
